task_description: Given clinical trial data for a new drug treatment, validate the hypotheses about efficacy and side effects compared to placebo.

hypotheses: H1: The treatment reduces symptom severity scores significantly compared to placebo
H2: The treatment achieves remission in more than 30% of patients
H3: The side effect rate of the treatment is not significantly higher than placebo
input_data.context: Phase III double-blind randomized controlled trial for moderate depression
